name: Super Stop Market
description_short: Super Stop is a Louisville-based check-cashing and bill payment service operating since 1994, offering check cashing up to $999, money orders, and utility bill payment services.
description_long:
Super Stop Market has been serving the Louisville, Kentucky community since 1994 as a neighborhood financial services provider. The company operates 24/7, 365 days a year from its location at 7303 Preston Highway, positioning itself as a convenient, always-available resource for residents needing quick financial transactions. The business model emphasizes accessibility and extended hours for customers who may not have traditional banking access during standard business hours.

Super Stop's primary service offering centers on check cashing (up to $999) alongside ancillary financial services. The company also provides money order services, bill payment processing for electric (LG&E) and water utilities, acts as a Kentucky Lottery agent and cashing location for lottery winnings, and handles general bill payment services. According to their website, they maintain competitive, low market-rate pricing and emphasize quick service execution. The company also appears to operate as a general retailer selling over 6,000 items beyond their financial services.

The company differentiates itself primarily through operational availability—their 24/7, year-round service model addresses a gap for customers needing check cashing outside traditional banking hours. Super Stop emphasizes customer relationships and satisfaction, noting they've "developed strong relationships with all Distributors" and view themselves as partners rather than transactional operators. Their messaging focuses on transparency ("nothing to hide pricing") and reliability built over three decades of community service.

Limitations are notable: the company's website contains incomplete information (the "About" section includes placeholder text), lacks detailed fee disclosures, and provides no online service capabilities. Check cashing limits at $999 are moderate, and the service scope is geographically limited to their single Louisville location. For consumers seeking digital convenience, extensive service options, or multi-location access, Super Stop serves a very specific use case.
pros: 24/7 operation, 365 days per year—accessible outside traditional banking hours
Check cashing available up to $999 without apparent membership requirements
Three decades of established community presence since 1994
Multiple bill payment options including LG&E electric and water utilities
Kentucky Lottery cashing agent for lottery winnings
Money order services for payment and transfer needs
Emphasis on transparent, competitive low-market pricing with no hidden fees
cons: Single location in Louisville with no multi-branch or online service options
Website contains incomplete/placeholder text in the 'About' section, suggesting poor maintenance
No fee schedule or pricing details disclosed on website for check cashing or money orders
No online services, mobile app, or digital check deposit capabilities
Limited check cashing limit of $999 compared to some competitors
best_for: Louisville residents needing check cashing outside traditional banking hours
Unbanked or underbanked customers seeking a local, trusted alternative to banks
Utility bill payers wanting to pay LG&E and water bills in-person without bank accounts
Kentucky lottery winners needing fast cashing services for large winnings
diagnosis: Super Stop is best for Louisville residents who need after-hours check cashing and bill payment services without a traditional bank account. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this single-location, cash-only operation serves only the Preston Highway area of Louisville and offers no digital alternatives for remote access.
services: Kentucky Lottery cashing agent (large winner cashing)
